entry.title: A free training bootcamp & certification opportunity for women in tech
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m David Chaviano from the SAP Community growth & adoption programs team. I am responsible for our digital skills initiative.

The digital skills initiative is a learn-to-earn program intended to get people generally considered to be underrepresented in tech into the SAP ecosystem. Participating organizations/instructors will be partnering with SAP in giving people from a disadvantaged/ unconventional /underrepresented background a chance to break into the tech sector and prove themselves while adding fresh talent to our ecosystem.

One subset of the initiative is getting a cohort of potential candidates and guiding them through a learning pipeline and linking them up with a customer, partner or SAP org willing to give these new folks a chance at a job/internship. This is sometimes done via virtual live bootcamp with an instructor.

Here is the registration information for one of these free bootcamps – it includes the registration details for candidates who are interested to sign up. Be sure to sign up via the link or QR code in the PDF.

For a full deep dive on what this certification is training you for, read this blog.

Feel free to pass it along to peers who may also be a good fit!

Regards,

David

entry.title: girls' day 2024
entry.content:
On April 25, 2024 I was again part of the initiative girl's day at SAP in St. Leon-Rot. It was organized by SAP's software development, especially @MattthiasWild and @katja_geiselhart (and many volunteers) and there were presentations from different SAP colleagues with different roles: a manager, a computer scientist, a financial expert and an SAP Community specialist. Furthermore there was a workshop around programming and how to use writing a software program for fun activities, a common lunch, and a student presented about his own experience how one can study or do an apprenticeship at SAP. Target group are girls out of 8th class of secondary school.

all attendees @girls' day (picture taken by @MattthiasWild )

It's not only that SAP is a great place to work for, if you are interested in computer science, but there are also so many other possibilities within SAP, not only technical ones. However, you would still be part of a technical company. Obviously my part was about SAP Community, as I am an SAP Community Advocate since 2018. 

I am so grateful having been part of the girls' day again. Actually, it was already my fourth time. 😊 I enjoy talking about SAP Community so much, because it's an easy understandable subject as of recent Social Media increase especially in the age after 12. The girls do easily understand and it inspires them to work with an online platform beside their Social Media activities, which they do anyway. I also point to my journey at SAP, which was not alway linear (if you want to get to know more about me, watch this video by SAP Women in Tech). Hopefully, my journey inspires the girls that they do not need to not go the established way of studying after their final examinations (Abitur), but to find an alternative. A basis where they can build on.

me presenting about SAP Community (picture taken by @MattthiasWild )

I am also trying to encourage them to find something, what they really want, because it's a long time they spend in their working environment. And it doesn't need to be the same with what you started once. Be open and curious to change your mind if something is not comfortable or not working properly for you anymore. I don't mean to throw everything away immediately, but have the courage to rethink the situation. Also here, a company like SAP is great, because there are many opportunities within the company for a reorientation.

 

I would love to share the last slide of my presentation here, because you may have children and it may give you a different view on the education of your children. I apologize if you have read this already somewhere here, but I think it's worth sharing again.

 

You see, initiative like girls' day are a great way of sharing your experience and giving guidance to younger people. If you would love to be part of girls' day in 2025, let me know. Please also share, if you were already part of it, or if you have experience from any other similar initiative. Looking forward to hearing your thoughts and comments.

entry.title: Re: BPC Security to view DM package status
entry.content: I have the same question

entry.title: Re: Update task in RAP model API
entry.content: I updated the question, making it more specific.

entry.title: Re: New 1H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
@Volker_Ruof I appreciate you taking the time to discuss the news extensively. Do you have any documentation detailing the features of the Joule interface with Microsoft Outlook? There is a holiday integration, and I'd like to examine the specifications. Perhaps if it also transmits the upcoming absences.
Best regards, José

entry.title: Re: Double entry for same field in BDCP2 for same message type while activating change pointer
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have the message types '/SAPSLL/DEBMAS_SLL' and '/SAPSLL/CREMAS_SLL' setup and RBDMIDOC is scheduled to run for master data for Customer and Vendor Changes to be replicated in GTS. However we noticed that the additional Street2 through Street4 fields are transferring to GTS only if a changes is made along to the main street field(STRAS). For example, if Street2 field is updated in Customer or Vendor without making any changes to Street(STRAS) field, then this change for Street2 field is not pushed to GTS. What additional configuration is needed to resolve this ? Activating the message type '/SAPSLL/ADRMAS_SLL' alone will solve this issue, or do we need to configure any new IDOC and Program altogether ? Any guidance or KBS pointers on this is highly appreciated.

Thanks,

Dhan

entry.title: Re: Disrupted screen after S4 2023 upgrade
entry.content:
Hi RD,

My recommendation. Make sure all your SAP Personas notes are up to date.  There may be a fix in the notes.  If you have the time, delete it and start over.  This would allow you to start fresh and see if the bug is still there.  If it is then your best bet would be to submit a ticket to SAP Personas group for support.  

Thanks,

Brian

entry.title: Assign different functional locations at tasklist level
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I have this requirements: 

the client wants to create a work order from a maintenance plan, that will have different functional locations defined for each operations. So the request is the possibility to define, for each operation inside a tasklist, a specific functional location/equipment.

I know that there is the possibility to assign a functional location for each operation from the "object list" inside the work order, but the request is to define different FLs for each operations inside the tasklist...because then, they wants to create this kind of WO from a maintenance plan (tied to that particular tasklist).

Thank you so much,

entry.title: Help Portal Down
entry.content:
Is the SAP Help Portal experiencing issues?
I'm unable to access it using any of the available browsers.

Upon attempting to load the page, it buffers for a moment and then displays the following messages:


Message appearing for the Help Sap Portal mainpage:

Internal Server Error - Read
The server encountered an internal error or misconfiguration and was unable to complete your request.
Reference #3.57757b5c.1715094786.ad881ae
https://errors.edgesuite.net/3.57757b5c.1715094786.ad881ae



Message appearing for the Help Sap Portal 1H2024 Release page:

An error occurred while processing your request.
Reference #221.57757b5c.1715094880.ad8110f
https://errors.edgesuite.net/221.57757b5c.1715094880.ad8110f

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Part 6 – Confluent as Replication Target
entry.content:
Minor correction: The text "Only available if Use Schema Registry is used/true." is imprecise 

Either say schema registry is used or the property Use Schema Registry is set to true, I would suggest.

Written in two places.

entry.title: Add a new role employee to the already created BP with any other role like vendor or customer.
entry.content:
Dear Experts, I'm trying to add a new rol employee to an already created BP with other roles like vendor or customer.

My scenario is S/4Hana. Using the report /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE creates a new BP with an employee role using the personal number . The problem is that a BP for the same person is already created with a vendor role(let's say for example) and I don't want to create two different Business Partners but only one with the two roles.

If I'm right, generation of BP with role employee is only possible by running the function.

The question is:

How do I configure the function to force the new employee role to be added to a specific BP?

Is that possible or I need some developping?

Thank you.

Alvaro GM

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Part 6 – Confluent as Replication Target
entry.content:
Is the Avro encoding available when using a private Kafka cluster with the schema registry? Or does the Kafka connector support Avro/Schema registry meanwhile as well?

 

Why are there two Kafka producers actually, Kafka and Confluent?

entry.title: 2024 Gartner® WMS Magic Quadrant™: SAP in the Leader’s Quadrant for the 11th consecutive year!
entry.content:
We are pleased to announce that for the 11th consecutive year, SAP has been named as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Warehouse Management Systems. SAP is positioned in the Leaders Quadrant based on our Ability to Execute and for the Completeness of our Vision.

We believe that this recognition confirms our strategy in Logistics which is based on three pillars:

  • Connecting every process to facilitate synchronized logistics execution, supporting highly efficient and fast-paced fulfillment cycles through seamless integration with logistics applications like SAP Transportation Management and SAP Business Network for Logistics etc.
  • Collaborating within a diverse ecosystem of system integrators, software partners, hyperscalers, hardware partners, and Robotics OEMs, with warehouse management being an integral part of cloud ERP.
  • Contextualizing every decision leveraging AI and machine-learning to optimize operations and to provide business insights.

SAP Extended Warehouse Management (SAP EWM) is an integral part of the overall SAP strategy and gives companies the ability to operate modern warehouses that must respond quickly to changing business conditions. The flexibility of SAP EWM helps manage a high volume of goods and run sustainable, risk-resilient operations with digitized warehouse processes in the cloud including direct control of warehouse automation equipment. We continue to innovate in SAP Extended Warehouse Management based on our market analysis and even more importantly based on feedback from our global install base and ecosystem. Recent innovations included cross-process integration in the areas of transportation, production, quality management, addressing industry-specific requirements, extensibility, and usability.

SAP EWM combined with SAP Transportation Management and SAP Business Network for Logistics, provides a platform for companies to collaborate with their logistics partners to gain end-to-end visibility and insights across their logistics operations. Our global partner network made up of systems integrators, business consultants and technology providers help our customers manage their warehouse management transformations, whether they be system replacements, upgrades, greenfield deployments, or part of larger enterprise transformations. 

“Warehouse Management with SAP EWM is an integral part of our cloud ERP offering. Customers use SAP EWM to manage their warehouse operations in sixty-six countries and twenty-four industries.” said Till Dengel Global Head of Logistics & Manufacturing Product Marketing at SAP.

“SAP Extended Warehouse Management helped Bridgestone reduce errors, with a new level of productivity and safety.” Eric Dyason, National Distribution Manager, Bridgestone New Zealand Ltd.

 

For more details on the latest Gartner Magic Quadrant for WMS: Gartner Report

* Gartner, Magic Quadrant for Warehouse Management Systems, Simon Tunstall, Dwight Klappich, Rishabh Narang, Federica Stufano, 2 May 2024

GARTNER is a registered trademark and service mark of Gartner, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the U.S. and internationally, MAGIC QUADRANT is a registered trademark of Gartner, Inc. and/or its affiliates and are used herein with permission. All rights reserved.

Gartner does not endorse any vendor, product or service depicted in its research publications, and does not advise technology users to select only those vendors with the highest ratings or other designation. Gartner research publications consist of the opinions of Gartner’s research organization and should not be construed as statements of fact. Gartner disclaims all warranties, expressed or implied, with respect to this research, including any warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.

entry.title: Re: I have a similar issue.I started using a report was a...
entry.content:
Thanks for the info.

  • Are there particular destinations or file formats that are causing the issue? e.g. If you schedule it to the default destination as a .rpt file does it work?
  • Do a Save As in your enterprise environment as a new report and try to schedule that.
  • If none of the above work create a new report just using that Command object, put all of the fields in the Details section, and schedule that.

Here's what I sometimes do if I've made changes to a report and it no longer works somewhere in the enterprise environment. Please do see Don's answer as well for further information.

  1. Make a local backup copy of the report on your laptop...*** very important of course ***.
  2. Go to to the enteprise environment and delete the report.
  3. Save the local copy back into the enterprise environment.
  4. See if it works.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: It worked quite well!

entry.title: Odata Service using BOBF - Property names
entry.content:
Hi All.

I have one DB table. Based on this table id created CDS. The name of the fields in CDS must be the same as in DB table, because from this CDS I've generated business object. 

Business object is maintained and then created OData service. 

But, name of the properties in this odata service strictly corresponds to the names of the fields in CDS. 

But I need to use different names (using CamelCase without special characters, such as underscore and so on). I cannot use those names in CDS (using "as", because generating BO ends with error. 

And annotation @odata.property.name is not taken into account. 

Please, do You have any idea how to use other name of the property in ODATA service than is in DB table (CDS). Or could I use projection view ? Or do I need to create ODATA using SEGW (but there are limitations from SAP for using generated CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE operations).

entry.title: How to mass upload Routing?
entry.content:
we have many operations assign to one finished goods, in order to improve engineer's efficiency, can we offer a tool for them to create it by batch? Any other tool can be used except migration cockpit?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload Routing?
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud there is an API API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING and Entity ProductionRoutingSequence to create operations for Routings

The API also supports Batch Requests

entry.title: Re: The CrystalDecisions package is not visible to any other projects except the first one, why?
entry.content: I need to add more to what I wrote yesterday. I can build the VS solution locally, but when I try to run it, it always fails, saying, "FileNotFoundException: Could not load file or assembly 'CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.CommLayer". But I can find it in the solution, in the local Packages folder. Why does it tell me it cannot find it, but I can find it?

entry.title: Re: Is extensibility possible to upload more than 999 lin...
entry.content:
Hi AjitDNS

Currently, That functionality is unavailable for Accounts Receivables in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

The Maximum summarization only provides the functionality for Accounts payables. The solution for Accounts Receivables is not on the SAP Roadmap.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/3a295f45d9354aa09418530288fc166c.html?locale=en-US&q=summarization

In SAP Continuous Influence for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition portal for customers and partners where you can submit your improvement request :

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud/continuous-influence

 

Thank you

Edna

entry.title: Re: Date in dates in the questionnaire
entry.content:
Hello,

If you are utilizing multi-fact reporting, the date filters go off the main fact. Is it possible reports for questionnaires and projects are set up differently? Here's some documentation on the multi-fact restrictions: https://help.sap.com/docs/buying-invoicing/reporting-fact-reference/multi-fact-reference?locale=en-US&q=filter%20by%20date#multi-fact-restrictions  

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: How to fetch follow on order in SAP PM
entry.content: Inactive is set at maintenance plan, it will not schedule.

entry.title: Re: READ Method is not triggering for SAP RAP Service Read Web API Call
entry.content: Any update on this . Pls let me know .

entry.title: Android Build continues to fail (Community Edition)
entry.content:
For weeks and weeks and version after version, the Android Build continues to fail with no help from the error message:

AB version: 2.3.0COMMAND:
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000  npxrnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

Can anybody help?

This is frustrating.  I've responded to other posts as well, with no response from the SAP team on a fix.

entry.title: Re: Assign different functional locations at tasklist level
entry.content:
Hi,

You have already gave the option, you need to maintain the Functional Location / Equipment in the Task List operation and when scheduling the maintenance plans, this Functional Location / Equipment will be transferred to Order Operation.

Good way to explore is using Functional Location TL or Equipment TL, since General TL will not be relevant. If the fields are grey out, check whether this is active.

IMG => PM & CS => Maintenance & Service Processing => Maintenance & Service Orders => Functions => Define Notification & Order Integration

There for your order type, Select Assignment of Technical Objects to Operations Active.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Transaction zapping in Sybase Replication Server
entry.content:
This may not apply to your situation, but there's one other way to clear the queue other than zapping.  You can temporarily alter the output DSI connection to skip inserts, update, deletes, or truncates for a specific table:

For example, to skip inserts for MYSERVER.MyDb:

 

alter connection to MYSERVER.MyDb for replicate table named MyTable set dsi_command_convert to 'i2none';  -- inserts are converted to none (not processed)

resume connection to MYSERVER.MyDb execute transaction;
-- Let the queue flush

alter connection to MYSERVER.MyDb for replicate table named MyTable set dsi_command_convert to 'none';  -- Confusing syntax to turn off conversion to none

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_REPLICATION_SERVER/62f3e3a6d49342cf9b7d72ee726a48b0/fdfee205bd1c1014b4b487aeccd51b27.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Getting error "adding element with duplicate id" in the Fiori APP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

PFA (For step by step detail)

 

Case 1 : From the front end, once we enter workorder and click the submit button we are able to bind the data to table by using below code. - Working fine
 
Calling the api in the ajax call and retrieving the api response.
 
                       var oPreviousModel = thisview.getModel("WData");
 
// If a model exists, destroy it to erase previous data
if (oPreviousModel) {
oPreviousModel.destroy();
}
 
                            var oModel = new sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel(data);
var sizeLimit = data.d.results[0].to_MaintOrderOpComponent.results.length;
oModel.setSizeLimit(sizeLimit);
 
// Set the model to the view for the new WO data
thisview.setModel(oModel, "WData");
 
Case 2: We just removed the WO (By using backspace) from the input box and added a new work order. (Without reloading the app) - failing with Duplicate id
 
thisview.setModel(oModel, "WData") - this line failing with "Error: “adding element with duplicate id '__input0-container-WorkOrderConsumption---WorkOrder--idProductsTable-0
 
How to resolve this error.
 
Screenshot 1 

Screenshot 2:

Screenshot 3

entry.title: Re: Mass PO , address field to be changed in PO in SAP MM
entry.content:
Hello, 

I suggest contacting your customer executive for help from Consulting or shared services teams from SAP.

entry.title: SAP Sales cloud Report : Issue with Standard Account Master Data Source
entry.content:
We've encountered an anomaly with the Standard Data Source: Account Master Data in the Sales Cloud- Design Datasource Work center. When applying the Aggregation/Total Rule, the custom key figure displays an asterisk (*) instead of data. Oddly, the same setup works flawlessly in our QA system.

We'd appreciate any insights or assistance you can offer to resolve this issue promptly.

Thanks,
Moumita

SAP Sales Cloud

entry.title: Re: Ariba IncludeInactive parameter not bringing Deleted/...
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently, you can only report on Confirming, Confirmed, Ordered, Shipping, Shipped, Receiving, and Received purchase orders. Adding Cancelled status to reporting has been suggested to SAP through Customer Influence.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to push translations from SAP to Ariba?
entry.content:
Hello, 

That error could be because the file sent through the master data upload isn't supported. Here is the list of supported files: https://help.sap.com/docs/buying-invoicing/administration-and-data-maintenance-fundamentals/default-batch-import-operations-for-sap-erp?locale=en-US&q=Import%20Batch%20Data%20task

entry.title: Re: WEBI regression testing and comparing Excel results
entry.content:
Bernhard, thank you so much for your response. No, the files to compare do not have to be in Excel, and that was a brilliant suggestion. I started exporting them to text format and am using Notepad++ Compare. It's a breeze.

It's a bit harder with reports with many tabs, but that's ok... I can check those manually.

Again, thank you so much for the suggestion. I really appreciate your response and the details.

entry.title: Re: Integration of Item Level Withholding Taxes of Ariba Invoice with SAP S4 HANA
entry.content: Really awesome stuff here!

entry.title: Re: Missing Entitlement for SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Currently I am not sure you can scope SAP Build Code in a PAYG for partners.

The only way we found to test it free was through the btp trial.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Wonder anyone else have this issue. 

After running the server overnight, I cannot log-in anymore.  SAP GUI log-in or ADT log-in has following error message.  

SAP GUI partner '127.0.0.1:3200' not reached WSAECONNREFUSED: Connection refused

After this, I have to shut down the server and reboot the PC several times and restart the docker and SAP A4H, to be able to log-in with SAP GUI again.  Currently I am using SAP Logon 7.5.

entry.title: Re: Disrupted screen after S4 2023 upgrade
entry.content: In addition to Brian's suggestion, try removing the Undo History of the flavor and for good measure, also delete permanently any old versions save for the latest. I have seen this helping in some cases when the flavor was showing similar unexpected behavior after an upgrade.

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content:
@MaiaraEllwanger. Update: The problem has been resolved, without changing bundle ID nor app name.

The error was caused by a mistake on my behalf with applying the certificate in SAP build.

I'm terribly sorry for any unintentional inconvenience caused.

Thank you & God bless...

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@kyo_choi2 Have you tried modifying the hosts file in the sap logon machine?

location:
C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc
/etc/hosts

Format:
IPAddress DomainName [DomainAliases]
example:
10.230.18.3 vhcala4hci.dummy.com vhcala4hci

saplogon setup:
application server: vhcala4hci

entry.title: Re: how we can import purchase orders in ariba
entry.content:
Hi,

It depends on your business needs, you can do requisitions to orders or skip this.

entry.title: SAC Import Job for Month End
entry.content:
Business needs to run import job multiple times a day (4 times a day) for the last week in the month. 

Question:

- Is there any recommendations on how we would be able to accomplish this?

- I've read some folks suggest creating identical import jobs and schedule them staggered out in the required timeframe. This means I might have 7 import jobs scheduled. Is there any impact to performance issues either in the input forms or any other assets?

entry.title: Re: SAC Story : Recent n Dates calculation
entry.content:
Is Inventory Date a measure or dimension?

If measure - I recommend converting to Date type dimension in Datasphere.

If dimension - I see a few options to get you there.

  1. First and most straight forward - Restricted measure on 'Current Date Input Control'. Here are a few articles to help out: <https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-analytics-cloud-how-to-get-data-from-current-date-1/qaq-p/11945195>  <https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/e1940498b0f3482892916c4b3a60d6e9.html>
  2. Alternatively, you could restrict the data using an input parameter in Datasphere. Here are a few articles to help out:  <https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/dinamyc-date-in-datasphere-fact-view-input-parameter/qaq-p/12760476> <https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/cdd8fa0fd74b495584dca343432f2814.html?q=analytic%20model>

entry.title: Third Party Cookies deprecation for SuccessFactors
entry.content:
First things first, What are third-party cookies?

Let's start with First-party cookies. First-party cookies are usually generated and placed on the user’s device by the website that the user is visiting. Such cookies are often used for facilitating user experience and some core functionalities of the site. For e.g. first-party cookies can identify returning visitors so that they do not have to use the username and password to log in on successive visits SSO. They are usually harmless since they do not “spy” on the users. 

Instead the Third-party cookies are generated and placed on the user’s device by a different website other than the one the user is visiting. They are created when a user visits a website that includes elements from other sites, such as third-party images or ads. If a server hosting one of these elements responds to the request by setting a cookie, that cookie is stored on the user’s browser.

When we talk about Google, this data is collected by Google Chrome. For Marketing specialists this is very valuable, since it shows the purchasing habits of users on the web.

 

Have you ever wondered how ads seem to follow users around the internet?

The answer lies in third-party cookies.

Imagine users are browsing a website selling sunglasses and check out some stylish aviators. They don’t buy them yet, but move on to a different website, let’s say a news channel. Suddenly, they start seeing ads for similar aviators and other sunglasses on the news website and various other websites they visit, even though they never searched for them there.

 

So, the third-party cookie acted like a tracker, connecting the user’s browsing activity across different websites

 

How does this involve SF?

SAP SuccessFactors uses third-party cookies for embedded iFrames to load some of the content and functionalities within the suite. Some examples of this iFrame embedding are the Learning header and the action links, SAC embedded Report Center page, and Employee Central (EC) Payroll embedded into the HXM EC using iFrame will be impacted.

 

What is an iframe?

An inline frame (iframe) is a HTML element that loads another HTML page within the document. It essentially puts another webpage within the parent page.

Since Google announced their plan to deprecate third-party cookies support in their Chrome browsers in Q3 2024, SAP SuccessFactors has been working on a solution to be delivered prior to the deprecation in 2024.

 

What's the solution then?

SAP has created the "Common Super Domain (CSD) solution" to avoid negative impacts.

The CSD solution consist in migrate all the  *.successfactors.com, *.successfactors.eu, *.sapsf.com or *.sapsf.cn, etc.) to the new common super domain (*.cloud.sap or *.sapcloud.cn for China data centers).

To make it clear: BizX, IAS, Learning, Onboarding 1.0, EC Payroll, SAC, BIRT, and WFA will migrate to the new common super domain.

 

OK, What do I need to do?

First of all read carefully the Customer/Partner Guide

It supposed that SAP SuccessFactors will contact each client and will provide guidance of the solution offering the opportunity to migrate to the CSD. At the end the process will be made as a self-service migration through the Upgrade Center.

If you haven't received the alert yet here you is one more time the Customer/Partner Guide with the detailed process. 

There are two steps to CSD migration 

1. Check Tool checks – These checks will ensure that your tenant is ready for seamless CSD Migration
by checking all the pre-requisites. 
2. CSD Migration – An upgrade will be available under Admin Center -> Upgrade Center -> Important
upgrades. When Upgrade Now button is clicked, all the pre-requisite checks(same ones those are
executed through the check tool) are executed and actual CSD migration will start.

 

Issue Solvers

If the CSD migration process runs into any error, report a support tickets to the LOD-SF-PLT-CSD
component.

For any issues post completion of the migration, SAP suggest to report support tickets to relevant module component where the issue is seen. For example: LOD-SF-LMS component for issues found in SuccessFactors Learning.

 

Useful Links

  • SAP SuccessFactors Third Party Cookies and Common Super Domain Rollout
    SAP officla blog by @SamanthaMunoz 
    https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/sap-successfactors-third-party-cookies-and-common-super-domain-rollout/ba-p/288563
  • Customer Partner Guide
    SAP giude
    https://d.dam.sap.com/a/woSFUZA/3PC_Deprecation_CSD_Migration_Customer_Partner_Guide%20Oct242023.pdf?rc=10
  • Impact of Third-Party Cookies Deprecation on SAP SuccessFactors
    file:///C:/Users/FTornaghi/Downloads/Third%20Party%20Cookies%20Frequently%20Asked%20Questions%20April%203%202024%20(1).pdf
  • 3436066 - SSO Configurations with IAS On common super domain cloud.sap 
    https://me.sap.com/notes/3436066/E
  • Adoption of Common Super Domain for SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite and Identity Authentication Tenant URLs
    Link

 

Hope this helps!
Give me Kudo!

entry.title: sap-approuter-userapi calling the route from ui xs-app.json but not app-router xs-app.json
entry.content:
Hi,

I have developed a sample ui5 MTA app using Stand alone app router. I am having two xs-app.json files(one from ui5 app, another from app router). I wanted to read the user information using sap-approuter-userapi service. I have maintained the route in xs-app.json file of app-router. But After deployment to CF when I run the app router  URL, in Network tab I can see that user-api call is getting failed. its giving me 404-Not found. What i observed is user-api is taking the default route which is defined in xs-app.json file of ui. Even though i have defined a seperate user-api route in xs-app.json file of router, it's not considering. May i know what am i missing? 

If i maintained the user-api route in xs-app.json file of ui5 app then I am getting the success and getting the data as well.

My point is why its considering the ui-xs-app.json file but not routers xs-app.json file?

please note that i have maintained user-api datasource/model at manifest.json of ui app in the correct way only.

Please see the attachements for error/ui-xs-app.json/router-xs-app.json 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - To replicate the system form matrix CFL that...
entry.content:
Hi kinyanjuikamau,

Unfortunately, this functionality is not available as a standard functionality. It will require a lot of customization if you would like to achieve the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Setting up Functional Currency for a Starter Pack Country
entry.content: This is a bit misleading.  You are creating an additional Freely Defined Currency type of which 8 can be defined.  There is an field in FINSC_LEDGER called Functional Currency.  Are you suggesting that we use one of the Freely Defined currency types instead of the proper functional currency for this requirement?

entry.title: Re: OData no result after impleenting the method get_expanded_entityset
entry.content:
I found the issue, the name of structure fields in program and data model is not same


the fields of structure in the program should be same in odata data model abap field name(association/structure,etc)
and this 

 

APPEND 'Nav_to_VbakExt' TO et_expanded_tech_clauses.

 

should be

 

APPEND 'NAV_TO_VBAKEXT' TO et_expanded_tech_clauses.

 

 need to use the ABAP field name not the XML tag/JSON field

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One quick question on the SAP EVENT MESH activation for Subscription Billing and SAP S/4HANA. Do we need to have 1NN business event handling enabled for public cloud or is there any standard out of the box event messaging can be used without having to have additional license for 1NN? @stefan_kiene 

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP Event Management SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How the ABAP Test Cockpit supports you to adopt ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @AnuragSri ,

this blog is dedicated to the ABAP Cloud developments in S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition and S/4HANA on-premise. The relevant blog for ATC setup in SAP BTP ABAP Environment is Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) for developments in SAP BTP ABAP Environment. The error message is valid, you can use only released objects in SAP BTP ABAP Environment. If you want to consume the unreleased BAPI from the on-premise system in SAP BTP ABAP Environment you need to wrap it using Tier 2 development guidelines in on-premise system, release the wrapper for ABAP Cloud development and finally consume this wrapper in SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: What is oauth signature ? in SAP JAM , how to get it for oauth 1.0 autentication
entry.content: I am looking to generate oAuth 1.0 signature also, no resources yet.

entry.title: Re: Update task in RAP model API
entry.content: Implicit DB commits occur when you do RFC calls, 'submit report', 'selects', dynpro screen changes and in many other situations. What do you mean by async call? RFC? Then a implicit commit occurs. It is always a good idea to use update task. The BAPIs run also in update task.

entry.title: Re: ADD ON for ERP 6 SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi Dharshan,

I hope this message finds you well. There is blog that says about that

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-to-json-conversion/ba-p/13411040

 

Regards,

David Solaliga

entry.title: Re: Send data from ERP to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope this message finds you well.SAP Integration Suite provides you with a comprehensive set of options to connect to SAP and non-SAP systems.

There is a document, respect your question: https://help.sap.com/docs/sisgw/sap-integration-suite-managed-gateway-for-spend-management-and-sap-business-network-configuration-guide-for-erp-integration-for-suppliers/how-to-configure-connection

 

Regards,

David Solaliga

entry.title: Re: Getting started with cds.ql in NodeJS for CAP - 101 on how to query data
entry.content:
Excelente Blog!
Could you update with Views with Parameters  ? ( 'cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cdl#views-with-parameters' ) 

I am trying to use a dinamic way to select a Calculation View, but i am facing error:

SELECT.from('ViewTest( IP_EMPRESA : ({empresa})  , IP_FILIAL: 0001 , IP_ANO: 2023 , IP_MES: 01 )') ;
 
"error": { "code": "ERR_CDS_COMPILATION_FAILURE", "message": "CDS compilation failed\nIn 'SELECT from ViewTest( IP_EMPRESA : ({empresa}) , IP_FILIAL: 0001 , IP_ANO: 2023 , IP_MES: 01 )' at 1:46-47: Error: Mismatched ‘{’, expecting ‹Boolean›, ‹Identifier›, ‹Number›, ‹QuotedLiteral›, ‹String›, ‘:’, ‘(’, ‘#’, ‘+’, ‘-’, ‘case’, ‘cast’, ‘exists’, ‘new’, ‘not’, ‘null’, ‘select’\n<query>.cds:1:55-56: Error: Mismatched ‘)’, expecting ‘;’, ‘except’, ‘excluding’, ‘group’, ‘having’, ‘intersect’, ‘limit’, ‘minus’, ‘order’, ‘union’, ‘where’, ‹EOF›" }

entry.title: Re: Sap Analytics Cloud - Input a Date Parameter into a D...
entry.content:
Hi, you said that the data action works when you hardcode the Date parameter like this MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "2024-01-01". What's the Date parameter in the data action monitor when hardcoded?

It looks like a time hierarchy problem. Maybe the date format that the data action is expecting is not correct. 

Try creating a table with date dimension and see what's the date format like shown in this video starting at min 08:00
https://youtu.be/Sy2on6IFP6A?si=uvIUvPW-B4NQ_9l0&t=435

entry.title: Re: Create an analytical model based on ABAP CDS views

entry.title: Re: TaxFactory 11.0

entry.title: Re: SAP MII How insert data to MDO throught illuminator
entry.content:
Hi Rafi,

Yes, you can use the update mode in the MDO query and in the attributes try to add only the columns of table you wanted to update. and as earlier assign the params accordingly.
once it is done, place the condition when you want to update those selected attributes. eg. [column.Name]=[Param.1]

and in the illuminator service just place the path of the update query and the associated params and pass the values.
It will work.

entry.title: Re: Redirecting to Build Apps when trying to open SAP BAS...
entry.content:
@Boopalan 

You can add the following parameter to the URL of Business Application Studio.

?externalRedirect=true
example: https://a2c7c84etrial.us10cf.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html?externalRedirect=true
 
Alternatively, you can open Business Application Studio when you chose "Additional Application Type" link in the below screen.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
hello @David_Chaviano ,

 

i have 10+ years of management experience in hospitality as an engineer and as exactly stated in the learning page I am willing to switch my job and pursue a career in engineering(mechanical). no doubt that SAP skills have a key role in this process so I can use my experience in a new field I am also used to. that is why I am seriously interested in learning SAP and get certified. thank you for your support and efforts in advance.

entry.title: Could someone please tell me what i need to do to add another column to this query that i have, i wa
entry.content:
Can somebody please help me to add a new column to a query that i have already. I want to add a column to show "the last purchase price" The query i have currently is as follows. Any help would be much appreciated.

Thankyou in advance.

SELECT T0.[ItemCode], T1.[ItemName], T0.[OnHand], T0.[OnOrder], T0.[IsCommited] as 'Sales BOs'

, ISNULL((select Sum( T3.[Quantity]) FROM OINV T2 INNER JOIN INV1 T3 ON T3.[DocEntry] = T2.[DocEntry]

    WHERE T0.Itemcode = T3.Itemcode and (T2.[DocDate] >= [%0] and T2.[DocDate] <= [%1])),0) as 'QTY Sold in Period'

, ISNULL((select Sum( T5.[Quantity]) FROM ORIN T4 INNER JOIN RIN1 T5 ON T5.[DocEntry] = T4.[DocEntry]

    WHERE T0.Itemcode = T5.Itemcode and (T4.[DocDate] >= [%0] and T4.[DocDate] <= [%1])),0) as 'QTY Returned In Period'

 

FROM OITW T0  INNER JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[ItemCode] and T1.[DfltWH] = '01' and T0.[WhsCode] = '01'

Where T1.[ItemCode] >= [%3] and T1.[ItemCode] <= [%4]

entry.title: Missing Root Group Folder - Unsorted Issues
entry.content:
We originally had a Root Group Folder. Somehow it got deleted. We've noticed that our Unsorted Folder has gotten large and when new developers come on to our project, a lot of stuff go into the Unsorted Folder. We were told that it could be due to the root group missing. 

Is there a way we can add the root group folder back or create one in the existing workarea? 

@DirkManuel @ShaneLipke

entry.title: Re: Missing Root Group Folder - Unsorted Issues
entry.content:
You're sure Root was deleted? First go to Server Workarea > Check Out Objects and see if it is listed there. if it is, select it, and then Set as Root.

Check Unsorted really carefully in case it is in there (try searching on 'root'). If it is, then right-click on it and select Group Options > Set As Root.

Check the server trash and see if it is in there (probably, even if it was deleted, as people rarely empty the server trash). If it is, restore it (and find out who deleted it and punch them). You'll then likely have to get all your authors to go through the first step above, again.

If it absolutely has been deleted (and then deleted from the server trash as well) then sure, create a new Group directly under the Workarea, call it root, and get all your authors to check it out and set as root. I don't know what designates it as 'root' (so that Producer says "you have checked out the server root...". Shane may know.

But again, I'd be surprised if it has actually been permanently deleted.

Stuff will go into Unsorted if Authors do not select a 'permanent home' for it (i.e. somewhere under Root). If there is no common root they will likely be just working in local Groups, or Groups that are currently in Unsorted (because their ultimate parent Root is missing). You may need to do some 're-education there, once you re-establish Root.

entry.title: How to add user related travelcosts to a class?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we want to add user related travelcosts to classes. 

For example: The class venue is outside of the origin destination of the user. So each user gets refunds for his travelcosts from our company. User A should receive € 50,-, User B schould receive € 20,-.

We created a costname

 

But now I have no idea where in the class I can add this costs per user. 
Doing the same with travelcosts for instructors is easy, because it's possible to add these costs to the cost summary.

 

SAP Help doesn't really help. Adding Learning Cost Names | SAP Help Portal

Do you have a solution?

Regards
Guido

If the window it's 1 year, I'm getting consistent results with the influencers playing an important role.

Thanks!

entry.title: We need help knowing how to edit and improve an odata service in SAP Cloud.
entry.content:
How to modify and enhance odata services?

we need to add the below changes on odata service:

  • order by column
  • Group by column
  • Add the sum and columns for each group.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We need help knowing how to edit and improve an odata...
entry.content:
You can make this changes by changing the URI as per the following chapter on the SAP Help page.

BW OData Queries
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361382894.html

entry.title: Re: ABAP Platform Trial with docker
entry.content: Make sure kubernetes is not running at the docker!!! Otherwise it will not start due to resource starvation.

entry.title: Integrating/Converting FINSTA IDocs in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Community, we are starting exploring the Public Cloud.

In our Inhouse Banking Process we have the involvement of Inhouse Bank Statements IDOCs and also for the ICRS Process sending of AVIS IDOCS between different SAP Landscapes. As this requirement is not changing so fast, we are wondering which options we have to integrate the FINSTA IDOCS into the Public Cloud. 

We did not found sofar any information if the MBC Connector, APM or other tools could automatically convert the IDOCS into and respective XML Format (CAMT 53 e.g.) which can be read / processed by Public Cloud. 

We are also open to build if required and extension, however searching first for a standard integration. Does anyone have made experience ? Thanks for your insight and thoughts.

entry.title: Re: Training about SAP
entry.content: I’m interested in this course

entry.title: Overall budget exceeded error VS Annual budget exceeded error
entry.content:
We were just upgraded to S4 on January 1st this year. When we tried to post invoices with SAP function module BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE, sometimes we got the expense exceeded the budget errors. My question is that why sometimes we got the "overall budget exceeded" error and sometimes we got the "annual budget exceeded" errors. What attributes make S4 to check the expense against the overall budget instead of annual budget? Is there a flag in the imported parameters of BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE can make S4 to check the expense against the annual budget instead of overall budget? Thank you in advance for your help!

Fisher Li

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Integration Monitoring for SAP S/4HANA Setup: Email Alert Configuration – Part 2
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we add distribution list to send email notifications? Currently in notification management we can add individual email IDs ad verify them but not distribution lists. Thank you

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: Thanks.   That's already been modified.  So the instance is active, and I can use it but leaving over night, I cannot log back on again.  It might be due to PC's fire wall or virus SWs.

entry.title: Re: Integrating/Converting FINSTA IDocs in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi carlopus,

IDocs are definitely not some future technology we built on. I would rather invest in other technologies and make use of APIs. So as far as I know also none of those components you mentioned support IDocs. What you can do is, map your IDocs to the SOAP API and use that.

More information on the official API hub: https://api.sap.com/api/BANKSTATEMENTPOST_IN/overview

My blog post here shows how you can start testing it:https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/calling-a-soap-api-using-postman/ba-p/13511139

 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Nuevo subsidio al empleo 2024 Mexico
entry.content:
1. NO entregar subsidio efectivo al trabajador (cc-nómina /481) antes del último periodo ordinario del mes de mayo. Para lograr esto se debe programar la BAdI badi_hmxcisr0_003 o el user-exit EXIT_HMXCISR0_003. Aquí, el valor máximo del parámetro de salida cred_fiscal se debe limitar al importe del parámetro de entrada desp_subs (requieren de un programador ABAP para realizarlo). Con esto no se generará el concepto /481. La desventaja de esta opción es que se puede estar aplicando un subsidio causado mayor al permitido con el nuevo método (no puede ser mayor a 390.12 pesos mensuales). Además, se puede estar aplicando un subsidio en un periodo que tal vez se deberá descontar en los siguientes periodos del mes (conforme se vayan acumulando los ingresos gravados mensuales).
2. Una segunda alternativa es redefinir la tabla T7MX14 con dos rangos. Por ejemplo, para la tabla mensual (ME01), el primer rango va de 0.01 a 9,081.00 y el valor de subsidio es igual a 390.12. El segundo rango va de 9,081.01 a 99,999,999.99 y el valor de subsidio es igual a 0.00. Así, sólo se aplicará el subsidio mensual a quien corresponda según los límites señalados en el Decreto. Se pueden crear las entradas correspondientes a las otras tablas (SE01, CA01 y QU01) con los importes equivalentes a dichas periodicidades. Aquí también se deberá programar la BAdI / user-exit del punto anterior para evitar la generación del cc-nómina /481. Una desventaja de esta opción es que si se realizan pagos extraordinarios durante el mes de mayo que generen la cc-nómina /410, entonces no se tomarán las bases mensuales totales para comparar con el ingreso máximo permitido por el Decreto (9,081.00 pesos mensuales). Esto último se puede resolver configurando adecuadamente la tabla T7MX70 para no generar bases gravadas extraordinarias, sino que todos los pagos se acumulen a los ingresos gravados ordinarios (cc-n /400).
3. Una tercera opción es no aplicar subsidio alguno al trabajador (cc-nómina /484) antes del último periodo ordinario del mes de mayo. Para lograr esto se debe programar la BAdI o el user-exit citados en el primer punto. Aquí, el valor del parámetro de salida cred_fiscal se debe igualar a 0.00 (requieren de un programador ABAP para realizarlo). Con esto no se generará el concepto /484. Así, no se aplicará un subsidio al que, tal vez, el trabajador no tendrá derecho una vez acumulados los ingresos gravados del mes. Al final del mes se puede calcular el impuesto con el método 4 “ajuste por periodo” con tabla ME01, mensual (ver tabla T7MX03) y, en combinación con el workaround 2 se puede dar cumplimiento al decreto.

entry.title: Why Logistics Visibility is Best with SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace
entry.content:
If you have ever had a vision examination with an optometrist, you know that the process is filled with options and decisions – from which strength of prescription best improves your vision, to which frames for the lenses best suite your needs. 

Achieving logistics visibility for your supply chain is similar in that the endeavor poses many options and decisions.  Supply chain and transportation professionals looking to increase logistics visibility will quickly reach a first decision point,

“How do I get milestone event or real-time visibility data to track shipments?”

And once faced with that question, then the path toward insightful logistics visibility turns to,

“How do I manage and leverage the visibility data to make my supply chain and fulfillment more efficient, predictable and resilient?”

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace answers both questions by providing a single solution that handles different types of logistics visibility data from a world of sources, while delivering the visibility information in the context of core business processes for more insightful awareness and proactive decision making. 

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace connects the physical movement of goods with a corresponding information flow that improves situational awareness beyond milestone reporting.  Businesses rely on this solution to improve supply and delivery assurance by tracking orders and shipments in real time, enabling exception detection, and revealing actionable insights that break down company silos. 

But early in the logistics visibility journey, when faced with the questions posed above, supply chain and transportation professionals are likely to initially encounter data services that provide shipment tracking based on export of a business’ core shipment information.  Or, it is likely that a carrier or freight forwarder may offer shipment tracking capability, either through a uniquely developed data-push, or through access to a separate tracking portal hosted by the service provider.

In either of these circumstances, the shipper or receiver is sacrificing two key aspects of logistics visibility:

  • Flexibility – to leverage visibility data from multiple sources covering the unique business processes of their organization
  • Integrated business context – to transform visibility data into insight and action for supply and customer delivery assurance 

To explore this further, logistics visibility through SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace enables seven distinct benefits over and above an individual visibility platform or service. 

1. Connect once, collaborate with many

SAP’s solution harmonizes and aggregates tracking across networks, transportation modes and geographies, through real-time data feeds normalized from multiple regional and global visibility providers.  As a core tenant of SAP Business Network, you can connect to SAP Business Network once, and collaborate consistently with the growing number of trading partners that connect to the network at your request, or of their own desire to grow new business. 

Avoid development and maintenance of custom integrations with different carriers or visibility data service providers.

2. Agnostic to data sources

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace enables processing of real-time and milestone updates in parallel from directly connected carriers, freight forwarders and logistics service providers via API or EDI.  In other words, you have options.  Visibility from carriers already providing visibility data to the network can be a primary option, or have your carriers leverage open APIs or EDI to start sending data to the network – or go with a regional or global visibility data service already connected to the network.  And if your needs change, you have options with other new or existing network partners without changing your one interface with the network. 

Here, the key point is: optimal logistics visibility maximizes the opportunity for data sources while normalizing the data delivered in the context of your business processes.  

Avoid disintegrated event updates from disparate partners.

3. Impact analysis

Receiving alerts, including deviations from overarching shipping or Purchase, Sales or Stock Transfer order fulfillment plans through SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, is key to seeing the impact of deviations from the plan along the related business process.  In addition to out-of-the-box processes for to core business processes, SAP’s visibility solution provides native flexibility in process modeling, as well as deep content to drive alerts, notifications, search, filter, monitoring, and logging, to answer questions like, “Will production be delayed?” and “Which customers are affected?”

Avoid gaps between transportation logistics and the related business context.

4. Insight-to-action

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace increases situational awareness through natively embedded real-time progress updates on a map linked to rich business (ERP) context for faster, better decision making.  In addition to out-of-the-box processes and native process modeling, event-to-action capability enables flexible connections and triggers between events, configurable statues, and actions that enable you to develop a more agile, responsive, and proactive approach to supply chain resilience and delivery assurance. 

Avoid look-up tables between business documents and shipment tracking numbers.

5. Standard, flexible, and seamless integration

Seamless feedback of real-time ETA and other key information into SAP S/4HANA, including SAP Transportation Management, is key.  With SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, core business data stays in your native environment, without risk or complexity of export and transmission of Purchase, Sales, or Stock Transfer order data to an outside platform.  The connection between shipment tracking and risk data is directly integrated with your core fulfillment and supply chain processes, with native access to customer and production data for enhanced insight and awareness without gaps. 

Avoid adding complexity to your IT landscape supporting transportation and supply chain logistics.

6. Flexible, consistent, and personalized user experience

SAP’s solution allows businesses to maintain consistent user access through standard and configurable roles.  By leveraging consistent user access, teams only see and act on what is relevant.  Training on new systems or interfaces with new data or service platforms is avoided, keeping your supply chain team efficient and effective focusing on core processes. 

Avoid duplicate user access or insufficient access controls.

7. Tailored to your tracking processes

Leverage flexible and extensible setup with SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace, supported by standard apps and templates, while still being able to define custom fields, tracking and execution statuses, event types and event-to-action scripts when needed, or build custom scenarios from scratch.  SAP’s solution enables you to run business processes uniquely, while maintaining a platform that can natively integrate logistics visibility information from any network carrier or data provider. 

Avoid process variations from different platform setup and capabilities.

Leveraging these benefits while avoiding the pitfalls listed above is key to effectively achieving logistics visibility.  Not only does SAP’s visibility solution help to drive the risk out of supply chain logistics, but it also helps to drive the risk out of a business’s pursuit to master this critical competency.    

To learn more about how SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace establishes a firm and flexible foundation for logistics visibility, please see below a side-by-side comparison with individual visibility platforms, and reach out through the Contact Us button on SAP.com. 

 

Hear and read more from SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace customers Blue Diamond Growers, B/S/H, and Al Dahra.

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Series Part 1 – Overview
entry.content:
Informative article Tobias!!!

Few aspects I want clarification on:

1. When we say replication, we truly mean replication of data from CDS view to the target real time or near real time like SLT? Basically a push and not a pull, correct?

2. When we use replication flows in SAP Datasphere to load data from S/4 HANA to AWS or Azure, will there be egress charges? Are there any other costs to move data from S/4 HANA to AWS or Azure using this way?

Regards,

Nag

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Series Part 2 – Premium Outbound Integration
entry.content:
hi Tobias,

Thanks for the informative blog.

QUESTION: When we are able to extract data from S/4 HANA to AWS or Azure using Glue or ADF through Odata services, why should I use this premium outbound integration through Replication flows in SAP Datasphere?

Cheers,

Nag

entry.content: Muchas gracias por tus comentarios. Evaluare cual opcion es la que mejor podemos adaptar.

entry.content:
not this one. the vocabulary based one. this is an example.

/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='UI_TRVLEXPNARRANGERMNGV2_VAN',Version='0001')/$value/"

entry.title: Re: Failed to load reported financial data with document...
entry.content: thanks, it's clear now, thanks for your support!

entry.title: Re: MDG Material Default value derivation without changing material entity for change CR Type
entry.content: Were you able to do it via access class? I am getting the same error in access class for similar scenario method - IF_USMD_PP_ACCESS~DERIVE_DATA

entry.title: Re: Insert some initial BP relation data though USMD_RULE_SERVICE_CROSS_ET fail In MDG.
entry.content: Were you able to find an alternative solution for this? I am getting the same error in access class for similar scenario method - IF_USMD_PP_ACCESS~DERIVE_DATA

entry.title: Duplicate clients in CDC
entry.content:
We have a CDC client retrieving information from several systems. One of this sources allows for business rules duplicate user identifiers.

When this happen, CDC take that user like new, so we have users with duplicate data.

We are looking a way to CDC make a report that help us to identifier the users that have some duplicate information and complement with the other user data and send it to them.

entry.title: Re: Sap Analytics Cloud - Input a Date Parameter into a D...
entry.content: HI Galin, thank for linking the Youtube tutorial on Adding Dynamic Date Controls. I am solved my issue and in addition learnt a bit more about how to debug in SAC using the MS developer tool!
